conversation.text: this sounds good but we're probably 2-3 months away from being ready
No problem. What's changing in a few months?
just finishing a rebrand then we're going heavy on ads

Makes sense. Worth knowing those leads will start coming in fast once the ads go live, and the build takes about 3 weeks. So if you start the conversation a few weeks before launch you'd be ready day one
Yeah just something to think about. Whenever the timing's right, you know where to find us
